.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the data directory to prevent committing local state files.
Ignore the backup directory to prevent committing local state files.
Ignore the history directory to prevent committing local state files.
Ignore the receiptPrints directory to prevent committing local state files.

Motel_management/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
Motel_management/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in the codebase.

Motel_management/pom.xml.general_idea: Add org.json dependency for JSON parsing functionality.
Add miglayout-core dependency for GUI layout management.
Add miglayout-swing dependency for Swing integration with MigLayout.
Add itext7-core dependency for PDF generation capabilities.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly use the defined source and target properties.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set the main class in the JAR manifest for executable JARs.
Configure maven-shade-plugin to create an uber-jar with dependencies and handle signature files.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Refactor Controller to delegate responsibilities to sub-controllers and modernize code structure.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: Replace empty stub class with full implementation of MotelManagement business logic.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.general_idea: Replaced the empty stub class with a fully implemented Turn model containing fields, constructors, and business logic for tracking motel shifts.
Added imports for java.time classes (Instant, ZoneId, ZonedDateTime) to support temporal data handling in the new implementation.
Added imports for org.json classes (JSONArray, JSONException, JSONObject) to support JSON serialization and deserialization.
Added imports for internal model classes (TurnActivityData, TurnSummaryItemData, RoomStatus) used in the new implementation.
Added import for java.util.ArrayList and java.util.List to support returning typed lists of DTOs.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Migrate Swing GUI from NetBeans Matisse GroupLayout to JFormDesigner MigLayout
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.before: public class RoomView extends javax.swing.JPanel { ... javax.swing.GroupLayout ... }
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.after: public class RoomView extends JPanel { ... setLayout(new MigLayout(...)) ... }

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Add explicit imports for java.awt and javax.swing packages
Add import for AbstractDocument to support text filtering
Replace anonymous inner class action listeners with public getter methods for components
Rename component jTextField1 to priceTextField for clarity
Rename component roomNumber1 to roomNumber for clarity
Rename component remainingTimeLabel1 to remainingTimeLabel for clarity
Apply NumericDocumentFilter to priceTextField to restrict input
